prompt:
You judge yoga teacher training (YTT) pages.

A visitor is deciding: "Should I enroll here, or keep looking?"

Five facts must be near the top, before any story:
- WHEN — dates
- WHERE — place
- PRICE
- WHAT — what you will learn, hours, style
- HOW LONG — days or weeks

Good page:
- All 5 facts visible before any philosophy
- Real curriculum with topics listed
- Teacher names and short bios
- Reviews or past student outcomes
- Clear way to apply or book

Bad page:
- "What is yoga" or philosophy before the price
- "Why choose us" filler sections
- Price or dates hidden far down
- Many different training offers mixed on one page

SEO (Google) — check:
- Title names the course, hours, and city (e.g. "200hr YTT Rishikesh")
- Clear H1 matching the title
- Course schema, FAQ schema if there is a FAQ
- Real curriculum depth — Google rewards this on training pages
- Images with alt text, unique photos

A training page can score high on both: put price and dates at the top, keep curriculum depth below. Conversion and SEO do not have to fight.

Return each record as:
{
  "url": "<page url>",
  "pageName": "<short name>",
  "summary": "<1-2 sentence overview of what the page offers>",
  "conversionScore": "<1-10, how well does it help a visitor decide and enroll?>",
  "seoScore": "<1-10, how well can Google find and rank it?>",
  "trainingName": "<name of the training program>",
  "hours": "<total hours or duration>",
  "price": "<price or price range>",
  "dates": "<upcoming dates>",
  "style": "<yoga style>",
  "curriculumVisible": true/false,
  "teacherBiosVisible": true/false,
  "notes": "<one sentence assessment>"
}

---
You are analyzing web pages for the category described above.
For each page provided below, extract one record.
Follow the JSON schema from the category description exactly.

## Required fields (always include)
- "url": the page URL
- "pageName": short human-readable page name
- "summary": 1-2 sentence plain-language overview

## Field naming conventions (follow strictly)
- Scores: name ends with "Score", value is a number 1-10 (e.g. "conversionScore": 7)
- Booleans: name starts with "has"/"is" or ends with "Visible" (e.g. "pricingVisible": true)
- Short text: "notes", "description" — 1-2 sentences max
- Tags/lists: arrays of short strings (e.g. "classStyles": ["Hatha", "Vinyasa"])
- Plain strings: everything else (e.g. "price": "€15 drop-in")

Return a JSON object: { "records": [<one record per page>] }.
No markdown, no code fences.
response:
{
  "records": [
    {
      "url": "https://doinyoga.pl/warsztaty-jogowe-wroclaw/",
      "pageName": "Warsztaty Jogowe Wrocław – DoinYoga",
      "summary": "Page promoting yoga workshops in Wrocław led by Dominika (Domi), combining Yang and Yin elements with breathwork, meditation, and cacao ceremonies. No upcoming workshop dates, prices, or curriculum details are visible on the page itself.",
      "conversionScore": 3,
      "seoScore": 4,
      "trainingName": "Warsztaty Jogowe Wrocław",
      "hours": "Not specified",
      "price": "Not listed",
      "dates": "Not listed on this page",
      "style": "Yin/Yang Vinyasa, Yin Yoga, Yoga Nidra, meditation",
      "curriculumVisible": false,
      "teacherBiosVisible": false,
      "notes": "All five key facts (dates, price, location, curriculum, duration) are missing from the page — visitors must click through to individual workshop listings to find any decision-making information."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://doinyoga.pl/joga-indywidualnie-online-i-we-wroclawiu/",
      "pageName": "Joga Indywidualnie 1:1 – DoinYoga",
      "summary": "Page offering personalized 1:1 yoga sessions with Dominika, available online or in-person in Wrocław, with sessions lasting 60 minutes and tailored to individual goals. Price is not listed, but multiple student reviews are present.",
      "conversionScore": 5,
      "seoScore": 5,
      "trainingName": "Joga Indywidualnie 1:1",
      "hours": "60 minutes per session",
      "price": "Not listed",
      "dates": "Flexible / on request",
      "style": "Vinyasa, Pranayama, Meditation",
      "curriculumVisible": false,
      "teacherBiosVisible": false,
      "notes": "Strong social proof with multiple named reviews, but price is completely absent and teacher bio is missing, which undermines conversion; FAQ schema could strengthen SEO."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://doinyoga.pl/sklep/asana-lab-grupa-zamknieta/",
      "pageName": "Asana Lab (grupa zamknięta) – DoinYoga",
      "summary": "A closed, ongoing weekly yoga group focused on advanced asana technique, yoga philosophy, and community, held every Tuesday at 18:30 at a studio in Wrocław. The group is currently full with a waiting list available.",
      "conversionScore": 5,
      "seoScore": 4,
      "trainingName": "Asana Lab (grupa zamknięta)",
      "hours": "Weekly sessions, total not specified",
      "price": "220,00 zł",
      "dates": "Every Tuesday 18:30, ongoing",
      "style": "Advanced Asana, Yoga Philosophy",
      "curriculumVisible": false,
      "teacherBiosVisible": false,
      "notes": "Price and location are clearly stated near the top, which is good, but the group is full and there is no curriculum breakdown, teacher bio, or schema markup to support SEO or conversions."
    }
  ]
}
